name: sim2d
description: Educational 2D simulations in a Workbench — SVG diagrams driven by formulas, GSAP timelines, and sim clocks. Replaces the old runtime motion hooks (useRafLoop/useSvgDrag). Author-editable glue copies into src/lesson/sim2d.

skill.loadWhen: the lesson needs a formula-driven 2D simulation or explanatory SVG animation inside a Workbench (kinematics, vectors, waves) — not a Pixi game stage
